channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Antonelli takes big Belgian GP win as Russell's woes deepen after Hamilton clash
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Kimi Antonelli overcame the misfortune of losing the lead through a Virtual Safety Car to overtake Charles Leclerc and win the Belgian Grand Prix on a day team-mate George Russell's title hopes suffered a major fresh blow.

item.title: FG Denies Commencement Of ₦50,000 National Support Allowance Registration
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Federal Ministry of Humanitarian Affairs and Poverty Reduction has dismissed claims that it has commenced registration for a ₦50,000 National Support Allowance, describing the reports circulating online as false. In a post shared on its official X page on Sunday, the ministry urged Nigerians to

item.title: Palace siege: Olojo Kosoko Ruling House urges police to obey court order
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Dapo AkinrefonThe Olojo Kosoko Ruling House of Lagos has faulted what it described as an unlawful siege on the Oloja of Lagos Palace, despite a subsisting court order directing parties to maintain the status quo. The ruling house, in a statement by its Head, Prince Surajudeen Abiodun Olojo-Kosoko

item.title: 2027: LP presidential candidate vows to overhaul Nigeria’s budget, procurement systems
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to Okereke, every item that gets into the zero budgeting system has a clear economic impact to be made and it can be verified.

item.title: Fund Raising: Enugu Catholic Church Displays Account Details On Banners
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: St Joseph’s Catholic Parish, Amakofia, Ohom-Orba, Udenu Local Government Area of Enugu State, has drawn reactions after displaying its account details on banners across the church to raise funds for its ongoing building project. The banners, seen by THE WHISTLER, are conspicuous at every corner of t

item.title: Can former employers withhold money from your 401(k) when you’re laid off?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: There are two main ways to move money from your workplace retirement plan when you leave your job. One can cost you.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph

item.title: 2027: Abbas dismisses rift rumours with Kaduna Gov. Uba Sani
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Speaker of the House of Representatives, Abbas Tajudeen, has dismissed speculation of a rift between him and Kaduna State Governor Uba Sani. The speaker described their relationship as cordial and anchored on mutual trust and shared commitment. Abbas stated this on the sidelines of the distribution

item.title: Cubana Chief Priest To Support Peller, Jarvis’ Wedding With N10m
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Following the announcement of the white wedding of popular content creators and TikTok stars, Peller and Jarvis, Nigerian businessman and socialite Cubana Chief Priest has said he would donate ₦10 million to support their wedding. Cubana Chief Priest made this pledge when Peller visited his home to

item.title: Appointments In My Administration Driven By Merit, Says Sanwo-Olu
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Lagos State governor, Babajide Sanwo-Olu on Saturday stunned his audience and declared that excellence, competence and integrity not ethnic background remain the guiding principles for appointments in his administration. The governor stated this at a reception organised by Urhobo and Isoko elites in

item.title: Britney Spears’ Son Jayden Debunks Viral Claim His Mum Was Cloned: ‘Go to Her Page and See Her Right Now’
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Britney Spears’ son, Jayden James, has dismissed a strange online conspiracy theory claiming the pop superstar has been cloned, urging people to stop believing everything they see on social media. Speaking during a recent livestream, the 19-year-old reacted to a viral TikTok video with more than 1.2

item.title: Why is Argentina’s football team so white?

item.title: NDLEA Arrests 80-Year-Old Man For Alleged Drug Dealing In Rivers
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Operatives of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) have arrested an 80-year-old man, Chika Ugwoji, in Rivers State for allegedly dealing in illicit drugs. The octogenarian was arrested at Ahoada on Tuesday, July 14, during an operation by the agency, where he was allegedly found in posse

item.title: US Marshals take Tate brothers into custody ahead of UK extradition push
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Their arrest which happened on Saturday was confirmed by the United States Marshals Service. They however, noted that they could not disclose the specific charges, citing a sealed arrest warrant.

item.title: Taraba LG Chairman Revokes Indigeneship Certificates
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The chairman of Gashaka local government area of Taraba, Mr Umar Yusuf, has revoked all existing indigeneship certificates in the council. item.title: World Cup: Mbappe becomes fourth player ever to score 10 goals at single tournament
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: France captain, Kylian Mbappe, on Saturday became the fourth player in the history of the FIFA World Cup to score 10 goals or more at a single tournament. The Real Madrid forward achieved this feat after scoring a brace in France’s 6-4 defeat against England in the World Cup third-pl

item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.title: NDI hosts maiden Robotics, STEM fair at Okrika Grammar School

item.title: L7 Bassist Jennifer Finch Dies At 59 After Courageous Battle With Brain Cancer
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Jennifer Finch, the bassist, vocalist and songwriter best known for helping power iconic alternative rock band L7, has died at the age of 59 following a battle with an aggressive form of brain cancer. The legendary musician’s death was confirmed by her bandmates, who paid an emotional tribute to the

item.title: Extreme Stock Swings Tempt Funds Into Reverse Dispersion Trade
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Betting that individual stocks will be volatile while the S&P 500 stays relatively calm has been a popular and successful hedge fund strategy. But with the swings in share prices reaching extreme levels, the reverse trade is gaining traction with investors.

item.description: Ogun State Governor, Prince Dapo Abiodun, on Sunday paid glowing tribute to his wife, Mrs. Bamidele Abiodun, as she marked her 60th birthday, describing her as a woman of virtue, compassion, unwavering faith and an indispensable partner whose steadfast support has been central to his life’s journey

item.title: Kate Henshaw breaks silence on life’s biggest lessons at 55
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: "Thank You to the King of Kings, my Heavenly Father, for every chapter. For every lesson. For every blessing—seen and unseen. And above all, for the precious loan of life," she said.

Air raid sirens also sounded in Jordan's capital, Amman, while Israel said it detected Iranian missiles targeting the coastal city of Aqaba. The

item.title: Shettima Arrives In Sierra Leone To Represent Tinubu At 69th ECOWAS Summit
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The summit is expected to consider major policy decisions and strategic resolutions aimed at strengthening peace and security, democratic governance, regional trade, across West Africa. The post Shettima Arrives In Sierra Leone To Represent Tinubu At 69th ECOWAS Summit appeared first on Channels Tel

item.title: Sanwo-Olu, Amuka lead dignitaries as Egube receives Urhobo, Isoko honour in Lagos
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Olasunkanmi Akoni Lagos State Governor, Babajide Sanwo-Olu, has said excellence, competence and integrity remain the guiding principles for appointments into the state’s public service. The governor stated this while joining Urhobo and Isoko leaders to honour his Deputy Chief of Staff, Engr

item.title: Suspected Nigerian drug kingpin Obase Prosper busted with ₦1.4bn Meth in India
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to the STF, Prosper was a key member of a Nigerian syndicate accused of operating sophisticated online romance scams by creating fake profiles on Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp while posing as citizens of the United States and the United Kingdom.

item.title: Full List: Winners At 2026 NBA Elections
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Electoral Committee of the Nigerian Bar Association (ECNBA) has announced the winners of the 2026 NBA national elections following the conclusion of voting and collation of results. Earlier, TVC News reported that Senior Advocate of Nigeria (SAN), Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya, was elected the 33r

item.title: Gov Otu rewards seven outstanding corps members with automatic employment
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: …Says Cross River’s future is secure with young achievers By Ike Uchechukwu CALABAR — Cross River State Governor, Senator Bassey Otu, has offered automatic employment to seven outstanding National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) members from the state in recognition of their exceptional performance

item.title: Troops kill 2 bandits, rescue 3 kidnap victims in Benue
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Troops of Operation Whirl Stroke (OPWS), in collaboration with the Benue State Civil Protection Guard, have killed two suspected bandits during a clearance operation in Katsina-Ala Local Government Area of Benue State. Acting Media Information Officer of OPWS, Lt. Ahmad Zubairu, in a statement noted

item.title: Edo NDC faces internal crisis as Agboneyinma’s supporters threaten to quit over primary dispute
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Johnbosco Agbakwuru ABUJA — A crisis may be brewing within the National Democratic Congress (NDC) in Edo State as supporters of former House of Representatives member, Ehiozuwa Johnson Agboneyinma, have threatened to leave the party if he is not declared the winner of the Edo South Senatorial Dis

item.title: DRIVE – Operational Excellence for AI-accelerated engineering
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://www.cortex.io/drive Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48968067 Points: 8 # Comments: 2

item.title: Prediction Markets Swell to 27% of Sports Bets During World Cup
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Prediction-market trading has surged during a blowout World Cup, far outpacing the growth at traditional sportsbooks and driving home the competitive threat that companies like Kalshi now pose to the sports-gambling industry.

item.title: How the World Cup has affected your Premier League team
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Once the trophy is lifted by either Spain or Argentina in New Jersey on Sunday night, attention will shift from the 2026 World Cup to the upcoming domestic season.

item.title: Actor Owolabi Ajasa debunks death rumour
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: He also condemned those behind the fake report, noting that he wishes them what they wish him.

item.title: The Clapper was a bad smart home gadget — and a viral sensation
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Clap on. Clap off. Well, more like, Clap, pause for half a beat but no longer because otherwise it'll stop hearing you, clap again because you waited too long, clap louder and faster, that didn't work, clap two more times, and suddenly: on. The Clapper didn't always work - and even when it did, it [

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: However, Kashim Ibrahim maintained that acknowledging the successes of the outgoing administration should not prevent The post 2027: Bauchi NDC guber candidate defends ambition appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Badejo-Okusanya Elected NBA President
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Senior Advocate of Nigeria, SAN, Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya, has been elected the 33rd President of the Nigerian Bar Association, NBA. Badejo-Okusanya secured a total of 12,317 votes, representing 47.18 per cent of the total votes cast in Saturday’s NBA national election. She defeated her closest c

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Joe Hart makes surprise prediction for Spain vs Argentina
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former England goalkeeper, Joe Hart, has predicted that Argentina will upset the odds against Spain in the World Cup final. Spain arrive for Sunday’s clash in New Jersey as favourites. La Roja outclassed France in the semi-finals, while Lionel Messi and co needed late goals to see off Eng
